# v2.0.0 — Agentic-AI Ecosystem + Platform Surfaces

**Released:** 2026-XX-XX (date set at tag time)
**Sibling parity bar:** cre-agent-audit v0.2.x discrimination-frontier + vendor-surface cycle (v2.0 lifts finserv-agent-audit ahead of cre-agent-audit on the agentic-runtime adapter and platform-surface front)
**Tag:** [v2.0.0](https://github.com/linus10x/finserv-agent-audit/releases/tag/v2.0.0)
**Zenodo DOI:** [pending re-issue at tag time]

---

## What changed since v1.3.0

v1.3 shipped the discrimination frontier and vendor surface — seven new governance modules (LDA search, LLM disparate-impact harness, effective-challenge harness, vendor-attestation ledger, retraining-cadence monitor, deprecation-watch, customer-facing chatbot guardrail), seven new ADRs (0020-0026), six regulatory + incident + disclosure docs, and the sixth FSI vendor class (foundation-model API providers).

v2.0 ships the **agentic-AI ecosystem and platform surfaces** — the surfaces enterprise-buyer conversations following v1.3 surfaced as the next bar. The major-version bump signals that finserv-agent-audit is no longer just a pattern library; it is the agentic-runtime audit fabric, the AIBOM emitter, the REST governance surface, the Kubernetes operator, and the adversarial test pack — all under one MIT-licensed, primary-source-cited roof, with the base wheel still zero-runtime-dependency.

**v2.0 is additive against v1.3.** No breaking API changes. All v1.x imports continue to resolve. The major-version bump signals ecosystem maturity (four runtime adapters + Kubernetes operator + REST endpoint + AIBOM dual emit), not a wire-format or import-path break.

Maintainer note: this notes file anticipates the full shape of v2.0 across Tranches A-E. Refresh the bullets below from `CHANGELOG.md` `[2.0.0]` once Tranche A-E commits land — only the surfaces that actually shipped should remain in the highlight list at tag time. Anything not shipped moves to the "deferred to v2.1" list.

## Highlights

### Tranche A — Four agentic-AI runtime adapters

- **`A2AAuditAdapter`** (`src/finserv_agent_audit/integrations/a2a_adapter.py`, [ADR-0027](../../docs/adr/0027-a2a-audit-adapter.md)) — Wraps the host application's A2A (Agent2Agent) server or client surface and emits one `AuditEvent` per task-lifecycle transition (`created -> updated -> input-required -> completed | cancelled | failed`) and one per message exchange. Transport-agnostic; SovereignVeto integrates at the inbound-task pre-execution boundary. Install with `pip install finserv-agent-audit[a2a]`.
- **`LangGraphAuditCallback`** (`src/finserv_agent_audit/integrations/langgraph_adapter.py`, [ADR-0028](../../docs/adr/0028-langgraph-audit-callback.md)) — LangGraph node / edge callback emitting an `AuditEvent` per node-entry, node-exit, conditional-edge resolution, and human-in-the-loop interrupt. SovereignVeto checks at the node-pre-execution boundary. Install with `pip install finserv-agent-audit[langgraph]`.
- **`MAFAuditAdapter`** (`src/finserv_agent_audit/integrations/maf_adapter.py`, [ADR-0029](../../docs/adr/0029-maf-audit-adapter.md)) — Microsoft Agent Framework adapter emitting one `AuditEvent` per agent-step, tool-call, and orchestrator-handoff. Supports both single-agent and group-chat orchestration. Install with `pip install finserv-agent-audit[maf]`.
- **`CrewAIAuditAdapter`** (`src/finserv_agent_audit/integrations/crewai_adapter.py`, [ADR-0030](../../docs/adr/0030-crewai-audit-adapter.md)) — CrewAI adapter wrapping Crew, Agent, and Task lifecycle hooks. SovereignVeto at the Crew-kickoff boundary. Install with `pip install finserv-agent-audit[crewai]`.

Convenience bundle: `pip install finserv-agent-audit[all-agentic]` installs all four at once.

### Tranche B — AIBOM Generator + FastAPI governance endpoint

- **`AIBOMGenerator`** (`src/finserv_agent_audit/governance/aibom.py`, [ADR-0031](../../docs/adr/0031-aibom-generator.md)) — Dual emit: one governance call yields a CycloneDX 1.7 ML-BOM (machine-learning-model component type + modelCard extension) and an SPDX 3.0 AI Profile document (ai_AIPackage class + AI-specific properties: training-data, model-explainability, safety-risk-assessment, energy-consumption, hyperparameters, type-of-model, the ai_useSensitivePersonalInformation flag). Two procurement-grade artifacts from one in-process governance state — eliminates the format-fork that procurement teams currently pay vendors to bridge.
- **FastAPI governance endpoint** (`src/finserv_agent_audit/integrations/governance_api.py`, [ADR-0032](../../docs/adr/0032-fastapi-governance-endpoint.md)) — REST surface (OpenAPI 3.1) for DEFCON state, veto log, audit-chain verification, vendor-score drift, deprecation calendar, and AIBOM emit. Includes a Server-Sent Events live stream of `AuditEvent` flow. Install with `pip install finserv-agent-audit[api]`; serve via `uvicorn finserv_agent_audit.integrations.governance_api:create_app --factory`.

### Tranche C — Kubernetes operator + CRDs + Kyverno / OPA samples

- **Kubernetes operator stub** (`deploy/k8s/operator/`, [ADR-0033](../../docs/adr/0033-kubernetes-operator.md)) — controller-pattern reconciler skeleton designed to run as a Deployment in the governance namespace.
- **Three custom resource definitions** (`deploy/k8s/crds/`): `AuditChain` (chain instance + retention policy), `SovereignVeto` (declarative veto + clearer-identity attestation), `ChainSink` (target ledger / witness / mi-proxy bindings).
- **Kyverno + OPA sample admission policies** (`deploy/k8s/policies/kyverno/`, `deploy/k8s/policies/opa/`) — pre-cleared bundles for the two most-deployed Kubernetes policy engines.
- **`deploy/k8s/README.md`** — one-page operator deployment guide.

### Tranche D — Adversarial test pack

- **Garak probe set** (`tests/adversarial/garak/`) — prompt-injection, sycophancy, and policy-bypass probes targeting the customer-facing chatbot guardrail and the LangGraph audit-callback boundary.
- **Promptfoo configs** (`tests/adversarial/promptfoo/`) — deterministic-seed scenarios driving the EALD-search, effective-challenge, and LLM disparate-impact harness surfaces.
- **Python harness** (`tests/adversarial/test_harness.py`) — coordinates Garak + Promptfoo runs and writes the consolidated report consumed by the new PCAOB AS 2201 ASSURANCE-GUIDE appendix.
- Reference: [ADR-0034](../../docs/adr/0034-adversarial-test-pack.md) and the ADR-0018 threat model.

### Tranche E — Five new strategic docs + PE portfolio dashboard

- **`docs/naic_model_bulletin_ai_insurers_mapping.md`** — NAIC Model Bulletin on the Use of AI Systems by Insurers; insurance-vertical mapping (carried forward from v1.4 planning).
- **`docs/dora_mapping.md`** — Regulation (EU) 2022/2554 (Digital Operational Resilience Act) crosswalk; Art. 28 third-party-ICT risk + ICT incident-reporting overlay aligned to `VendorAttestationLedger` + `AuditChain`.
- **`docs/eu_ai_act_aug_2026_compliance_pack.md`** — Consolidated EU AI Act compliance pack timed to the August 2026 high-risk-AI substantive-obligation entry into force; bundles the Art. 9 risk-management, Art. 12 logging, Art. 13 transparency, Art. 14 human-oversight, and Art. 15 accuracy / robustness / cybersecurity controls into a deployer checklist.
- **`docs/pe_portfolio_playbook.md`** + **`docs/pe_portfolio_dashboard.md`** — PE operating-partner-facing rollout sequence for portco AI governance (30 / 60 / 90 / 180-day deliverables) + reference dashboard schema.
- **`docs/pcaob_as_2201_amendments_appendix.md`** — PCAOB AS 2201 amendment overlay as a separate `ASSURANCE-GUIDE` appendix; Big-4 audit-evidence walkthrough refreshed to the amended ICFR-attestation surface (carried forward from v1.4 planning).

## Upgrade notes

### Backward compatibility — additive only

v2.0 is fully additive against v1.3. The major-version bump signals ecosystem maturity (four runtime adapters + Kubernetes operator + REST endpoint + AIBOM dual emit), not a wire-format or import-path break. All v1.x imports continue to resolve.

The v1.1 deprecation re-export shims at `patterns/`, `schemas/`, and `examples/defcon_state_machine.py` remain in place — their removal is now scheduled for v2.1 (one additional minor-bump grace window beyond the originally announced v1.2 removal). Migrate to the canonical `finserv_agent_audit.*` paths to insulate from that follow-up bump.

### New extras

```bash
# Per-adapter
pip install finserv-agent-audit[a2a]
pip install finserv-agent-audit[langgraph]
pip install finserv-agent-audit[maf]
pip install finserv-agent-audit[crewai]

# FastAPI governance endpoint
pip install finserv-agent-audit[api]

# Convenience bundles
pip install finserv-agent-audit[all-agentic]      # all four runtime adapters
pip install finserv-agent-audit[all-integrations] # every v1.2 + v2.0 onramp
```

The base install remains zero-runtime-dependency. Each adapter import-guards its upstream SDK behind a `HAS_X` boolean.

### CLI tool

`finserv-audit verify` and `finserv-audit maturity` are unchanged from v1.2 + v1.3.

### CI impact

Adopters mirroring the CI workflow get the per-adapter, AIBOM, governance-API, and adversarial-pack tests inside the existing `pytest` step; no separate job. Coverage gate remains 90%.

## Manual follow-ups for the maintainer

1. **PyPI publish via Trusted Publishing** — same flow as v1.2 / v1.3 (`.github/workflows/publish.yml`). Two-stage: TestPyPI smoke -> required-reviewer gate -> production PyPI.
2. **Zenodo DOI re-issue** — link the new tag to the existing Zenodo record so the DOI badge resolves to v2.0.0.
3. **Refresh this release-notes body** — replace the anticipated bullets with the actual shipped surface once Tranches A-E commits land. Anything not shipped in this tranche moves to the "deferred to v2.1" list.
4. **README badges** — Sigstore-signed + PyPI version badges remain in place from v1.2; no new badge work required.

## What's deferred to v2.1 — Ecosystem Completion

- **DSPy adapter** — Stanford-originated framework with production usage at Moody's; prestige play for the FSI buyer conversation.
- **LlamaIndex Workflows adapter** — agentic-runtime adapter for the LlamaIndex Workflows event-driven orchestration surface.
- **GraphQL governance endpoint** — Strawberry-GraphQL alternative to the v2.0 REST surface for adopters standardized on GraphQL.
- **Removal of the v1.1 deprecation re-export shims** at `patterns/`, `schemas/`, `examples/defcon_state_machine.py`.
- **UK FCA mapping** (`docs/fca_mapping.md`) and **Singapore MAS mapping** (`docs/mas_mapping.md`).
- **`ProtectedClassProxyDetector` SHAP / CDD arms** — per ADR-0019 v1.2 reconciliation deferral; v1.3 shipped the LDA arm via `LDASearchHarness`.
- **LDA-search continuous-feature quantile-binning helper** — per `ProtectedClassProxyDetector` v1.2 docstring deferral.

## What's deferred to v3.0 — Async + Multi-Region + WASM

- **Async-native pattern variants** — `asyncio`-compatible versions of every governance pattern for high-throughput agent pipelines.
- **Multi-region audit-chain federation** — cross-region replication with quorum-anchored witness commits and a regional-failure de-conflict protocol.
- **WASM runtime for client-side guardrail evaluation** — compile the customer-facing chatbot guardrail and the autonomy-ladder runtime helper to WebAssembly for in-browser pre-flight enforcement.
